# Contributing

This repository is a **reference implementation** of atomic design for small Angular teams.

We are not actively accepting contributions. The project is maintained as an educational reference.

## How you can use this project

- **Fork and adapt** — use this as a starting point for your own project. See [docs/14-replication-guide.md](../docs/14-replication-guide.md).
- **Reference in discussions** — link to this repo when explaining atomic design, design tokens, or Angular component architecture.
- **Report documentation errors** — if you find an inaccuracy in the docs, you may open an issue.

## What happens to PRs

Pull requests will not be merged. If you have found a bug or documentation error, please open an issue instead.

## If you fork this project

See [docs/14-replication-guide.md](../docs/14-replication-guide.md) for a step-by-step guide to replicating this setup on a new project.
